message:
test(runtime): add regression test for quiescence with completed tasks

Add test verifying asx_runtime_is_quiescent returns true when all tasks
are completed (terminal) and all regions are closed, even though task
slots remain allocated in the arena. This covers the semantic live-task
scan fix from bd-ghvv (FuchsiaHare).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
